description: Invite code lookup table in Realtime Database. Maps a short invite code to the teacher UID who created it.

uid.description: UID of the teacher who owns this invite code

description: Students enrolled under a teacher. Document ID is the student's identification number.

identificationNumber.description: Student identification number — used as document ID

status.description: Enrollment status managed by the teacher

joinedAt.description: When the student joined the workspace

description: Workspaces a student belongs to, keyed by teacher UID. Read by the student to list their enrolled workspaces.

uid.description: Teacher UID — matches the document ID

active.description: Whether the workspace is currently active for this student
